nodes.label: Secret Scanning Hooks (detect-secrets)
nodes.rationale: The .secrets.baseline whitelists known dev-default and test-fixture strings; anything new is blocked. Migrations are excluded because generated *_hash column names trip the keyword detector without holding secrets.

nodes.label: Ruff Lint and Format Hooks
nodes.rationale: Local hooks reuse the project's pinned ruff via uv (single source of truth, same as CI) rather than a separately versioned pre-commit mirror.
